title: Board Wide Columns - Monday CRM

posts.author: Huey (Elijah)
posts.cookedHtml: The ability to add columns to a board as a whole would be nice. There are some things that universally apply to every lead in board because the board essentially represents a project. It would b nice to apply the important universal things like files, dates, etc. that apply to the entire project/ board. In addition, we’d need this accessible via API for automation purposes.
